hooks.command: echo 'SessionStart: Composer = primary OpenClaw orchestrator (repo role chief-coordinator). Re-read snapshots first (~60-80 lines). Delegate read-only coordinator/drift consults to explore+deepseek-v4-flash; plan to deepseek-v4-pro. See agents/rules/grok-harness-usage.md.'; cat agents/coordinator/chief-coordinator/{charter,memory}.md 2>/dev/null | head -30; node -e "const i=require(\"./.agent-factory/memory-index.json\"); console.log(\"memory entries:\", i.agent_count, i.entry_count); const cc=i.entries.filter(e=>/chief|coordinator|drift/.test(e.agent_id||e.topic||'')).slice(0,2); console.dir(cc.map(e=>({id:e.id,topic:e.topic})))" 2>/dev/null || true; echo "pnpm agent:harness:prove for token/proof report; ccusage for Codex cross-check."; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status 2>/dev/null || true
